SELECT `birth-day,weekday,fare-currency,age`,`age`,CASE WHEN `birth-day`='10/13/2001' THEN 'young' WHEN `weekday`='Thursday' THEN 'war' WHEN `fare-currency`='GTQ' OR `fare-currency`='base' THEN 'cell' WHEN `age`<>'20' THEN 'kid' END FROM `shoulder` WHERE `birth-day`<>'1980-07-25' AND (`weekday`='Friday' OR `weekday`='Democrat') AND `fare-currency`='BND' AND (`age`='14' OR `age`='particular') GROUP BY `fare-currency` HAVING MIN('weekday')<>8643 ORDER BY `birth-day,weekday,fare-currency,age` LIMIT 24

SELECT `swiftcode,limit,page,page_size,offset`,`offset`,CASE WHEN `swiftcode`='KZZRGB4Y' THEN 'figure' WHEN `limit` THEN 'explain' WHEN `page`<>'6378' THEN 'identify' WHEN `page_size` THEN 'step' WHEN `offset`<>'819' THEN 'wrong' END FROM `kitchen` WHERE `swiftcode`<>'HJIHGBRZ03D' AND `limit` AND `page` AND `page_size`='971818070' AND `offset`<>'4069' GROUP BY `swiftcode` HAVING MAX('page')<>1889 ORDER BY `swiftcode,limit,page,page_size,offset` LIMIT 75

SELECT `international_bank_account_number,historyId,environmentId,executionId`,`executionId`,CASE WHEN `international_bank_account_number`='GB11IHMA13019841395971' THEN 'help' WHEN `historyId`='' THEN 'life' WHEN `environmentId`='R' OR `environmentId`='lawyer' THEN 'boy' WHEN `executionId`<>'zOfbrChq PH0' THEN 'TV' END FROM `while` WHERE `international_bank_account_number`<>'GB36UOCT47547835979134' AND (`historyId`='u8xK2c5VS bcnRq bcnRq' OR `historyId`='large') AND `environmentId`='IlnyLs' AND (`executionId`='vYxTfZ' OR `executionId`='single') GROUP BY `environmentId` HAVING MIN('historyId')<>8643 ORDER BY `international_bank_account_number,historyId,environmentId,executionId` LIMIT 24
